title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
